name: Pieyon
description: A famous physical training YouTuber affiliated with Strawberry Productions, where he is the agency's top earner. On request from company president Miyako Saitou, he promotes the new B-Komachi by collaborating with Ruby Hoshino and Kana Arima in a physical training video on his channel.

name: Rentt Faina
description: Rentt is a bronze-class adventurer who never managed to climb higher in the ranks in over 10 years. One day, he has an unfortunate run-in with a dragon and ends up being turned into a skeleton.

name: Rhya
description: __Affinity:__ Imitation __Height:__ 181 cm A rogue mage and a member of the Eye of the Midnight Sun's Third Eye. ~!He is an elf reincarnated into the body of a human.!~

name: Roger Smith
description: He is the Negotiator. His job entails finding a resolution for the troubles of Paradigm City, the "City of Amnesia". He'd negotiate anything for anyone, but he is a professional and expects the parties to behave professionally. When memories betray the people and force them to reawaken monstrosities of the city's past, Roger's only option is to fight back with a monstrosity of his own, the black megadeus Big O.

name: Teria Wang
description: One of the two-second-year prefects of the Black Dogs dormitory, and Kochou's twin sister. She is known as the Engineering expert, with expertise regarding machinery. Despite their small stature, they are actually 14 years old, having skipped grades because of their intellect. However, Teria only joined so that she could be by her sister's side. name: Yamato Nikaidou
description: Yamato Nikaido comes across as very lazy and easy-going, but he is very passionate about what he does and cares a lot about the other members of IDOLiSH7. He took up the position of “Leader” only because he was the oldest in the group, he actually considered pulling himself out of the audition for IDOLiSH7.

description: Former member of the Astronomy Club, where she won the grand prize in the National High School Astrophotography Contest.

name: Huo Liaoyuan
description: Courtesy name Zilong, adopted at the same time he took on the name Zhao Yun. Liaoyuan Huo is the leader of the Sima clan's notorious assassin squad, the Crippled Legion, and is best friend with the clan's young head, Sima Yi. Besides prodigious fighting skills, he has the unique handicap of inability to feel pain, making him one of the strongest warriors in the story. name: Kaede Komura
description: Komura is a shy, good-natured middle-school boy. He has had a crush on Mie since the first days of school, but because of his fear of being rejected, it is difficult for him to confess his love to her. He loves playing games, especially those at the arcade.

description: The student council president at Hideki's school and the leader of the Alley Cats guild in LA. She has long dark hair and goes under the character name Apricot (アプリコット, Apurikotto), a male mage at the beginning of the series. Her guild mates call her Master. She comes from a wealthy family; her father is on the school board, and her family has several companies. name: Maya Kitajima
description: __Height:__ 155 cm A talented young actress who originally worked as a waitress in a Chinese restaurant alongside her mother. Her father died when she was a little girl and her mother, Haru, is mentally unstable and for a long time she thinks of Maya as useless. She is discovered by the former diva [Chigusa Tsukikage](https://anilist.co/character/7851/Chigusa-Tsukikage) and starts a promising, yet thorny acting career under her wing.
